notes: The game fails to start. Instead it shows an error pop-up dialog saying "Failed to initialize graphics. Make sure you have DirectX 11 installed, have up to date drivers" etc.
title: Airport Madness 3D: Volume 2

notes: This is a 32-bit game, therefore you need to install the vulkan-drivers:i386 on your distribution. Then it works as expected.
title: Airport Madness 3D: Volume 2
